contexts.context: MK: This proposal changes <mark>strip-space</mark> on fn:doc to being three valued.…
MK: The proposed default is to follow <mark>strip-space</mark> and preserve-space, which is equivalent to…
…was the justification for not giving more power to <mark>strip-space</mark>?
RD: For the <mark>strip-space</mark> option, there is a boundary space policy in…
…some functions is very worrying. The fact that <mark>strip-space</mark> and preserve-space apply globally is very unsatisfactory…
